case_title: YVONNE DETERT VS. CYNTHIA ANN STILTZ et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT STILTZ, CYNTHIA ANN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT CYNTHIA STILTZ' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THAT THE RENT ORDINANCE DOES NOT APPLY. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF DETERT, YVONNE AS TO DEFENDANT STILTZ, CYNTHIA ANN

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT CYNTHIA STILTZ' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THAT THE RENT ORDINANCE DOES NOT APPLY. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)
